{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "MMT Consults is a dynamic Human Resource Consulting and General Services firm dedicated to delivering innovative, practical, and sustainable solutions that empower organizations to achieve excellence. We partner with businesses across diverse sectors to optimize their people, processes, and performance, ensuring growth, efficiency, and long-term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Lifecamp, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking to hire a customer care representative who will be responsible for managing customer interactions, handling online food orders through platforms such as Glovo, resolving complaints, and ensuring excellent customer satisfaction.
	The role requires strong communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to coordinate effectively with kitchen, dispatch, and delivery teams to ensure timely and accurate order fulfillment.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive and respond to customer inquiries via phone calls, WhatsApp, social media, and online delivery platforms.
	Manage and process customer orders on Glovo accurately and promptly.
	Confirm orders, delivery details, payment status, and special customer requests.
	Coordinate with the kitchen and dispatch team to ensure timely preparation and delivery of orders.
	Monitor incoming online orders and track delivery progress.
	Handle customer complaints professionally and escalate unresolved issues when necessary.
	Maintain proper records of customer interactions, orders, complaints, and feedback.
	Provide customers with information about menu items, pricing, promotions, and delivery timelines.
	Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction and positive customer experience.
	Follow up with customers when necessary to ensure service quality.
	Assist in managing reviews and ratings on online delivery platforms.
	Support daily administrative and customer service operations as assigned.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: mmtconsults@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-13",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-26",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "MMT Consults"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "198857"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 75000,
      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Customer Service Representative Job at MMT Consults




        
    

        
        MMT Consults is a dynamic Human Resource Consulting and General Services firm dedicated to delivering innovative, practical, and sustainable solutions that empower organizations to achieve excellence. We partner with businesses across diverse sectors to optimize their people, processes, and performance, ensuring growth, efficiency, and long-term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Lifecamp, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking to hire a customer care representative who will be responsible for managing customer interactions, handling online food orders through platforms such as Glovo, resolving complaints, and ensuring excellent customer satisfaction.
	The role requires strong communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to coordinate effectively with kitchen, dispatch, and delivery teams to ensure timely and accurate order fulfillment.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive and respond to customer inquiries via phone calls, WhatsApp, social media, and online delivery platforms.
	Manage and process customer orders on Glovo accurately and promptly.
	Confirm orders, delivery details, payment status, and special customer requests.
	Coordinate with the kitchen and dispatch team to ensure timely preparation and delivery of orders.
	Monitor incoming online orders and track delivery progress.
	Handle customer complaints professionally and escalate unresolved issues when necessary.
	Maintain proper records of customer interactions, orders, complaints, and feedback.
	Provide customers with information about menu items, pricing, promotions, and delivery timelines.
	Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction and positive customer experience.
	Follow up with customers when necessary to ensure service quality.
	Assist in managing reviews and ratings on online delivery platforms.
	Support daily administrative and customer service operations as assigned.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Executive",
  "description": "Elevated HR Limited - We are a diversified one stop place for employers looking to recruit talents to fill the different positions within their organization.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Executive
Job Locations: Lagos Mainland and Island - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief


	We are looking for hard-working Marketers to join our client&rsquo;s team. The ideal candidate must have a passion for marketing, strong analytical skills, and the ability to thrive in a collaborative team environment.


Responsibilities


	To sell and market company products (Food Items).
	Develop and execute strategic marketing plans to achieve sales and business objectives.
	Conduct market research to identify market trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences.
	Collaborate with other team members to develop integrated marketing and sales initiatives to drive growth and expansion.


Qualifications and Requirements


	SSCE, Diploma or Bachelor&#39;s degree.
	Proven experience in marketing.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Creative thinking and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Very hard-working and organizational skills.
	Results-driven mindset.





Salary
N70,000 &ndash; N100,000 / month + Commission

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: elevatedhumanresources@gmail.com using &lsquo;&rsquo;Marketing Executive&rsquo;&rsquo; as the subject of the mail.",

Marketing Executive Job at Elevated HR Limited




        
    

        
        Elevated HR Limited - We are a diversified one stop place for employers looking to recruit talents to fill the different positions within their organization.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Executive
Job Locations: Lagos Mainland and Island - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief


	We are looking for hard-working Marketers to join our client’s team. The ideal candidate must have a passion for marketing, strong analytical skills, and the ability to thrive in a collaborative team environment.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To sell and market company products (Food Items).
	Develop and execute strategic marketing plans to achieve sales and business objectives.
	Conduct market research to identify market trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences.
	Collaborate with other team members to develop integrated marketing and sales initiatives to drive growth and expansion.


Qualifications and Requirements


	SSCE, Diploma or Bachelor's degree.
	Proven experience in marketing.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Creative thinking and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Very hard-working and organizational skills.
	Results-driven mindset.





Salary
N70,000 – N100,000 / month + Commission

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using ‘’Marketing Executive’’ as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier (Canteen Services)",
  "description": "Lily hospitals Ltd, established since 1986 remains one of the foremost hospitals in Nigeria and within the South-South region of the country. It is the first private hospital in Nigeria to achieve ISO 9001:2000 quality management system certification from the Standards Organization of Nigeria (SON). Also we areconsistently committed to high standards; continuous improvement, service excellence, organizational citizenship, and outstanding work ethics.

At Lily hospitals, weare consistently committed to high standards; continuous improvement, service excellence, organizational citizenship, and outstanding work ethics. running residency training programs in family medicine and radiology. Lily Hospitals is also involved in housemanship training, internship training in Pharmacy and Radiology. We have multiple locations in Benin, Warri, Okuokoko etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier (Canteen Services)

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a trustworthy, organized, and customer-friendly Cashier to manage financial transactions within our canteen services unit.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for processing payments, maintaining accurate financial records, and supporting smooth daily canteen operations.
	The successful candidate must be honest, attentive to detail, and capable of handling transactions accurately in a busy environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive and process customer payments accurately
	Operate cash register and POS systems efficiently
	Issue receipts and maintain records of daily sales transactions
	Balance cash register and reconcile transactions at the end of each shift
	Maintain accurate financial and inventory records where necessary
	Assist in monitoring stock and reporting shortages
	Attend to customers courteously and professionally
	Ensure proper handling and safekeeping of cash and other payment instruments
	Support the smooth daily operation of the canteen
	Perform other assigned duties as directed by management


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE / OND qualification in Accounting, Business Administration, or related field
	1&ndash;2 years of cashiering experience, preferably in a canteen, restaurant, or retail environment
	Good numerical and record-keeping skills
	Ability to operate POS machines and basic accounting tools
	Honest, responsible, and detail-oriented
	Good communication and customer service skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Must reside in Warri, Delta State or its environs, as accommodation will not be provided


Skills and Competencies:


	Numerical accuracy
	Accountability and integrity
	Customer service orientation
	Time management
	Attention to detail
	Ability to work with minimal supervision.


Benefits


	Competitive salary package
	Friendly and professional work environment
	Opportunities for growth and career development
	Training opportunities


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Resume, Result, and Copies of Credentials and License to: recruitment@lilyhospitals.net using the job title as the subject of the mail.",

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head of Service Management",
  "description": "Tatum Bank is a forward-thinking, customer-centric financial institution dedicated to offering innovative banking solutions. Tatum Bank provides a full range of financial services and is focused on empowering customers with seamless, accessible banking experiences that foster financial growth and security.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Service Management

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	The Head of Service Management is a critical leadership role responsible for the design, delivery, and continuous improvement of IT and all other business service processes.
	This role ensures that internal and external services are resilient, compliant with financial regulations, and aligned with customer expectations.
	The candidate will bridge the gap between technical delivery on all measurement areas and business value.


Core Responsibilities


	Process Governance: Standardize and oversee ITIL-based processes, including Incident, Problem, Change, Request, and Knowledge Management.
	Performance Measurement: Establish and monitor Key Performance Indicators and Service Level Agreements (SLAs) to ensure system uptime and service quality in all departments.d
	Service Continuity: Partner with Risk and Security teams to ensure robust Disaster Recovery (DR) and Business Continuity Planning (BCP) in line with banking regulations.
	Vendor Management: Oversee third-party service providers and outsourcing partners to ensure they meet contractual obligations and security standards.
	Continual Service Improvement (CSI): Drive a culture of data-driven improvement, using root cause analysis (RCA) to eliminate recurring issues and enhance operational efficiency.
	Stakeholder Management: Act as the primary liaison between IT and business units to ensure service transparency.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in IT, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field&nbsp;
	7&ndash;10 years of experience in IT Service Management, preferably in banking/financial services&nbsp;
	Relevant certifications (ITIL, COBIT, PMP); ISO certification is an advantage&nbsp;
	Strong expertise in ITIL processes, SLA/KPI management, and service performance oversight&nbsp;
	Solid understanding of regulatory compliance, risk, and vendor management&nbsp;
	Demonstrated leadership experience managing teams and senior stakeholders&nbsp;
	Membership of relevant professional bodies (e.g., ISACA, PMI, BCS) is an added advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@tatumbank.com using &quot;Application - Head of Service Management&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Head of Service Management Job at Tatum Bank




        
    

        
        Tatum Bank is a forward-thinking, customer-centric financial institution dedicated to offering innovative banking solutions. Tatum Bank provides a full range of financial services and is focused on empowering customers with seamless, accessible banking experiences that foster financial growth and security.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Service Management

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Head of Service Management is a critical leadership role responsible for the design, delivery, and continuous improvement of IT and all other business service processes.
	This role ensures that internal and external services are resilient, compliant with financial regulations, and aligned with customer expectations.
	The candidate will bridge the gap between technical delivery on all measurement areas and business value.


Core Responsibilities


	Process Governance: Standardize and oversee ITIL-based processes, including Incident, Problem, Change, Request, and Knowledge Management.
	Performance Measurement: Establish and monitor Key Performance Indicators and Service Level Agreements (SLAs) to ensure system uptime and service quality in all departments.d
	Service Continuity: Partner with Risk and Security teams to ensure robust Disaster Recovery (DR) and Business Continuity Planning (BCP) in line with banking regulations.
	Vendor Management: Oversee third-party service providers and outsourcing partners to ensure they meet contractual obligations and security standards.
	Continual Service Improvement (CSI): Drive a culture of data-driven improvement, using root cause analysis (RCA) to eliminate recurring issues and enhance operational efficiency.
	Stakeholder Management: Act as the primary liaison between IT and business units to ensure service transparency.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field 
	7–10 years of experience in IT Service Management, preferably in banking/financial services 
	Relevant certifications (ITIL, COBIT, PMP); ISO certification is an advantage 
	Strong expertise in ITIL processes, SLA/KPI management, and service performance oversight 
	Solid understanding of regulatory compliance, risk, and vendor management 
	Demonstrated leadership experience managing teams and senior stakeholders 
	Membership of relevant professional bodies (e.g., ISACA, PMI, BCS) is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application - Head of Service Management" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant",
  "description": "Tatum Bank is a forward-thinking, customer-centric financial institution dedicated to offering innovative banking solutions. Tatum Bank provides a full range of financial services and is focused on empowering customers with seamless, accessible banking experiences that foster financial growth, security


We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant

Job Location: Abuja



What you&rsquo;ll be doing


	Manage the Executive calendar, scheduling appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements with precision and discretion
	Serve as the primary point of contact between the Executive and internal/external stakeholders, handling correspondence and communications professionally
	Prepare and review reports, presentations, memos, and briefing materials ahead of executive engagements
	Coordinate logistics for board meetings, management retreats, and high-level executive functions, including agenda preparation and minute-taking
	Track and follow up on action items, deadlines, and deliverables assigned by the Executive across departments
	Handle sensitive and confidential information with the utmost professionalism and integrity
	Liaise with internal departments and external partners on behalf of the Executive to facilitate smooth communication and coordination
	Manage travel logistics including flight bookings, hotel reservations, airport transfers, and travel documentation


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree (BSc) or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Business Administration, Secretarial Studies, Office Management, Social Sciences, or any related discipline

	3&ndash;6 years of experience in an executive assistant or personal assistant role, preferably within the banking or financial services industry

Executive Assistant Job at Tatum Bank




        
    

        
        Tatum Bank is a forward-thinking, customer-centric financial institution dedicated to offering innovative banking solutions. Tatum Bank provides a full range of financial services and is focused on empowering customers with seamless, accessible banking experiences that foster financial growth, security


We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant

Job Location: Abuja
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    





What you’ll be doing


	Manage the Executive calendar, scheduling appointments, meetings, and travel arrangements with precision and discretion
	Serve as the primary point of contact between the Executive and internal/external stakeholders, handling correspondence and communications professionally
	Prepare and review reports, presentations, memos, and briefing materials ahead of executive engagements
	Coordinate logistics for board meetings, management retreats, and high-level executive functions, including agenda preparation and minute-taking
	Track and follow up on action items, deadlines, and deliverables assigned by the Executive across departments
	Handle sensitive and confidential information with the utmost professionalism and integrity
	Liaise with internal departments and external partners on behalf of the Executive to facilitate smooth communication and coordination
	Manage travel logistics including flight bookings, hotel reservations, airport transfers, and travel documentation


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree (BSc) or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Business Administration, Secretarial Studies, Office Management, Social Sciences, or any related discipline
	Professional certification is an advantage: Certified Administrative Professional (CAP), Institute of Chartered Secretaries and Administrators (ICSA), or relevant equivalent
	3–6 years of experience in an executive assistant or personal assistant role, preferably within the banking or financial services industry
	Exceptional organisational and time management skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously
	Strong written and verbal communication skills, with a high level of attention to detail
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and virtual collaboration tools
	Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to engage effectively with senior stakeholders.




Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application – Executive Assistant" as the subject of the email.
